examples: The age of hedonism is being ushered out by a new era of temperance.
The terms hedonism and eudaimonism bring to mind the great philosophical debate, which has shaped Western civilization for over 2,000 years, about the nature of the good life.
One reason: We're just about the first generation to learn universal hedonism in our youth.
Not that there's any point in sermonizing about such a self-consciously anarchic celebration of adolescent hedonism.
